source_pr.title: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level
source_pr.body:
```
for dir in $$dirs 
    go test -race dir
done
```

run the test package sequentially, while

`go test -race A B C` let them parallel on package level

symptoms: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level
failure_signature: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Running in parallel with shared state can introduce races. This PR stabilizes it by: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level.
fix_pattern: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level

evidence: evidence: Makefile: make race test parallel on package level
